chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1588 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 01-02-2024 Mr. Yameen Ali Khoso, Advcoate for petitioner. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer, ECP. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada, D.A.G. ***** Learned counsel for petitioner, in view of the fact that Election Tribunal has been notified vide Notification dated 23.06.2023, does not press this petition and seeks permission to avail the remedy before the said Tribunal in accordance with law, to which there is no objection. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
